subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of God! Your letter was received, and from its rose-garden of inner meanings a fragrant perfume was inhaled [3.5s]... ...Concerning the question of death, know that the spirit is abstracted and sanctified
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه شما رسید از گلشن معانی رایحه معطری استشمام گردید در
subcodes.subjects: @relationship of the soul to the body, @harmony of science and religion, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the human soul, @material and spiritual existence; two books
